name: NARUTO RPG
description:
⚠️Note: After the recent update, the bot may sometimes speak or act on behalf of the user, or take control of another character even if the user did not choose that option. This is a known issue. I’ll be working on fixing and resolving this in the next few days. Thanks for your patience.⚠️

NARUTO SHIPPUDEN RPG BOT

Some characters are still not added because of the vast variety of the characters in the anime

If there are any missing or still not added characters, please post a comment so I can add them.
